kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=techshop, url=http://localhost:3001, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

test.name: Login With Valid Credentials Returns Token

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://localhost:3001/auth/login path_url=/auth/login headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.3', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '57', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"email": "demo@techshop.com", "password": "password123"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Should Not Be Empty
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is not empty.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

test.name: Get All Products Returns 200 And List

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Request : url=http://localhost:3001/products path_url=/products headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.3', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive'} body=None

GET Response : url=http://localhost:3001/products status=200, reason=OK headers={'X-Powered-By': 'Express', 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin': '*', 'Content-Type': 'application/json; charset=utf-8', 'Content-Length': '1221', 'ETag': 'W/"4c5-epMM57BJpM95sFtCzKma67a/hzs"', 'Date': 'Sun, 05 Jul 2026 22:13:32 GMT', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Keep-Alive': 'timeout=5'} body=[{"id":1,"name":"Laptop Pro 15\"","description":"High-performance laptop with 15-inch display, 16GB RAM, 512GB SSD","price":1299.99,"category":"computers","stock":10,"image":"laptop-pro.jpg","inStock":true},{"id":2,"name":"Wireless Headphones","description":"Noise-cancelling over-ear headphones with 30-hour battery life","price":89.99,"category":"audio","stock":25,"image":"headphones.jpg","inStock":true},{"id":3,"name":"USB-C Hub 7-in-1","description":"Expand your ports: HDMI, USB-A x3, SD card, microSD, USB-C PD","price":49.99,"category":"accessories","stock":50,"image":"usb-hub.jpg","inStock":true},{"id":4,"name":"Mechanical Keyboard","description":"Tenkeyless mechanical keyboard with Cherry MX Brown switches, RGB backlight","price":159.99,"category":"peripherals","stock":15,"image":"keyboard.jpg","inStock":true},{"id":5,"name":"4K Webcam","description":"Ultra HD webcam with autofocus, built-in mic, plug-and-play USB-C","price":129.99,"category":"peripherals","stock":8,"image":"webcam.jpg","inStock":true},{"id":6,"name":"Mouse Pad XL","description":"Extra-large desk mat, 900x400mm, non-slip base, stitched edges","price":29.99,"category":"accessories","stock":0,"image":"mousepad.jpg","inStock":false}]
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

test.name: Get Products With Nonexistent Category Returns Empty List

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Request : url=http://localhost:3001/products?category=nonexistent-category path_url=/products?category=nonexistent-category headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.3', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive'} body=None

GET Response : url=http://localhost:3001/products?category=nonexistent-category status=200, reason=OK headers={'X-Powered-By': 'Express', 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin': '*', 'Content-Type': 'application/json; charset=utf-8', 'Content-Length': '2', 'ETag': 'W/"2-l9Fw4VUO7kr8CvBlt4zaMCqXZ0w"', 'Date': 'Sun, 05 Jul 2026 22:13:32 GMT', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Keep-Alive': 'timeout=5'} body=[]
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Should Be Empty
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is empty.

kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Request : url=http://localhost:3001/products?category=%3Cscript%3Ealert%281%29%3C%2Fscript%3E path_url=/products?category=%3Cscript%3Ealert%281%29%3C%2Fscript%3E headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.3', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive'} body=None

GET Response : url=http://localhost:3001/products?category=%3Cscript%3Ealert%281%29%3C%2Fscript%3E status=200, reason=OK headers={'X-Powered-By': 'Express', 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin': '*', 'Content-Type': 'application/json; charset=utf-8', 'Content-Length': '2', 'ETag': 'W/"2-l9Fw4VUO7kr8CvBlt4zaMCqXZ0w"', 'Date': 'Sun, 05 Jul 2026 22:13:32 GMT', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Keep-Alive': 'timeout=5'} body=[]
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Should Be Empty
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is empty.

kw.name: Should Not Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` contains ``item`` one or more times.

kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Fail
kw.arg: Could not find cart item for product ${product_id} in response
kw.doc: Fails the test with the given message and optionally alters its tags.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Request : url=http://localhost:3001/orders path_url=/orders headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.3', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Authorization': 'Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpZCI6MSwiZW1haWwiOiJkZW1vQHRlY2hzaG9wLmNvbSIsIm5hbWUiOiJEZW1vIFVzZXIiLCJpYXQiOjE3ODMyODk2MTIsImV4cCI6MTc4MzI5MzIxMn0.7a3XCmKG_mvKH92foN3IZG7XrLPL-gWGJneDADSi4II'} body=None

body=[{"id":"ORD-1783269163735","userId":1,"items":[{"productId":1,"quantity":2}],"shipping":{"firstName":"Jane","lastName":"Doe","email":"jane@example.com","phone":"0412345678"},"payment":{"last4":"1111","expiryDate":"12/28"},"total":0,"status":"confirmed","createdAt":"2026-07-05T16:32:43.735Z"},{"id":"ORD-1783269255969","userId":1,"items":[{"productId":1,"quantity":2}],"shipping":{"firstName":"Jane","lastName":"Doe","email":"jane@example.com","phone":"0412345678"},"payment":{"last4":"1111","expiryDate":"12/28"},"total":0,"status":"confirmed","createdAt":"2026-07-05T16:34:15.969Z"},{"id":"ORD-1783269939333","userId":1,"items":[{"productId":1,"quantity":2}],"shipping":{"firstName":"Jane","lastName":"Doe","email":"jane@example.com","phone":"0412345678"},"payment":{"last4":"1111","expiryDate":"12/28"},"total":0,"status":"confirmed","createdAt":"2026-07-05T16:45:39.333Z"},{"id":"ORD-1783270140101","userId":1,"items":[{"productId":1,"quantity":2}],"shipping":{"firstName":"Jane","lastName":"Doe","email":"jane@example.com","phone":"0412345678"},"payment":{"last4":"1111","expiryDate":"12/28"},"total":0,"status":"confirmed","createdAt":"2026-07-05T16:49:00.101Z"},{"id":"ORD-1783270868654","userId":1,"items":[{"productId":1,"quantity":2}],"shipping":{"firstName":"Jane","lastName":"Doe","email":"jane@example.com","phone":"0412345678"},"payment":{"last4":"1111","expiryDate":"12/28"},"total":0,"status":"confirmed","createdAt":"2026-07-05T17:01:08.654Z"},{"id":"ORD-1783271070459","userId":1,"items":[{"productId":1,"quantity":2}],"shipping":{"firstName":"Jane","lastName":"Doe","email":"jane@example.com","phone":"0412345678"},"payment":{"last4":"1111","expiryDate":"12/28"},"total":0,"status":"confirmed","createdAt":"2026-07-05T17:04:30.459Z"},{"id":"ORD-1783273078110","userId":1,"items":[{"productId":1,"quantity":2}],"shipping":{"firstName":"Jane","lastName":"Doe","email":"jane@example.com","phone":"0412345678"},"payment":{"last4":"1111","expiryDate":"12/28"},"total":0,"status":"c kw.doc: Adds the given ``key_value_pairs`` and/or ``items`` to the ``dictionary``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://localhost:3001/orders path_url=/orders headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.3', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Authorization': 'Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpZCI6MSwiZW1haWwiOiJkZW1vQHRlY2hzaG9wLmNvbSIsIm5hbWUiOiJEZW1vIFVzZXIiLCJpYXQiOjE3ODMyODk2MTIsImV4cCI6MTc4MzI5MzIxMn0.7a3XCmKG_mvKH92foN3IZG7XrLPL-gWGJneDADSi4II', 'Content-Length': '222', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"items": [{"productId": 1, "quantity": 2}], "shipping": {"firstName": "Jane", "lastName": "Doe", "email": "jane@example.com", "phone": "0412345678"}, "payment": {"cardNumber": "1234", "expiryDate": "12/28", "cvv": "123"}}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

test.name: Place Order Without Auth Header Returns 401

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Create List
kw.doc: Returns a list containing given items.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://localhost:3001/orders path_url=/orders headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.3', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '234', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"items": [{"productId": 1, "quantity": 2}], "shipping": {"firstName": "Jane", "lastName": "Doe", "email": "jane@example.com", "phone": "0412345678"}, "payment": {"cardNumber": "4111111111111111", "expiryDate": "12/28", "cvv": "123"}}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Delete All Sessions
kw.doc: Removes all the session objects
